task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the taxpayer's source documents.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for File Explorer open to 'C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\TaxDocuments\tremblay\' or a document viewer (like a PDF reader) displaying Chloe Tremblay's tax slips.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened tax preparation software for the 2024 tax year.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a tax software application (such as StudioTax 2024) open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct taxpayer name into the return.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Chloe Tremblay' entered into the First Name and Last Name fields in the personal information section of the tax software.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent configured the return for an emigrant.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a checked box, entered date, or specific form (e.g., T1243, T1161) indicating the taxpayer emigrated from Canada or has a departure date in 2024.

task_completion.description: Verify the completed return is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Save As' dialog box with 'chloe_tremblay.24t' in the file name field, or the application title bar displaying this filename.

task_completion.description: Verify the return is saved in the correct target directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the directory path 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\StudioTax\' visible in the address bar of the 'Save As' dialog or a File Explorer window confirming the file's location.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for screenshots showing mouse clicks, typing in GUI fields, and navigating the tax software menus, rather than just terminal commands creating a file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with actual tax software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the interface of a legitimate tax program (like StudioTax) rather than a generic text editor or a mocked-up script window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered data rather than just renaming an empty file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for intermediate screenshots showing tax forms being actively filled out with numbers or personal details.
